artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T074650-016a9bfb/reviewer-stream.log

success
The test follows the bead's specified sketch closely: builds an outer bare repo, snapshots before, contaminates `GIT_DIR`/`GIT_WORK_TREE`/`GIT_INDEX_FILE` via `t.Setenv`, drives `ExecuteBead` + `LandBeadResult` (preserve path) with a no-op runner that creates one file (so `SynthesizeCommit` fires), and asserts byte-for-byte equality of the bare repo plus an explicit config-bytes check. The commit message documents that the gate was validated by temporarily reverting `RealGitOps.WorktreeAdd` to bare `exec.Command("git", …)`, confirming the test fails when env-scrubbing is removed.
